seoTitle: Rangari vs Rankin Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rangari and Rankin Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rangari vs Rankin Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rangari and Rankin Park.
heading: Rangari vs Rankin Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rangari, New South Wales and Rankin Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rangari has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Rankin Park (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rangari or Rankin Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rangari has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Rankin Park scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rangari scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Rankin Park scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rangari or Rankin Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rangari has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
